title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised)
description:
The RBI has updated its guidelines to permit acquisition and bridge finance for promoter stakes in new companies. This move enhances flexibility in corporate financing structures.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Undertaking of Financial Services) – Amendment Directions, 2026 (Revised) appeared first on TaxGuru.
